mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the Skyactiv 2.0L engine improves throttle response and adds a more audible induction note during spirited driving.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and filter. Ensure MAF sensor housing diameter matches stock. 15 minutes. No tune needed.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: The stock ND exhaust is quiet. A performance catback adds character to the Skyactiv engine while keeping drone to a minimum for top-down cruising.
mods.partNumbers: Goodwin Racing RoadsterSport 3 Exhaust, Cobalt by Racing Beat
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe back. Single exit center or dual exit options. Hangs on factory mounts. 30 minutes on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the ND by 15–20mm to close the wheel gap and sharpen handling without compromising ride quality for daily driving.
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. All four corners. The ND is already low — be careful not to go too aggressive to avoid scraping. Alignment mandatory.

mods.name: Performance Header
mods.description: A tubular header replaces the stock cast manifold for improved exhaust flow and a noticeable increase in mid-range and top-end power.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock manifold heat shield and exhaust manifold. Install new header with fresh gasket. O2 sensor relocator may be needed. Tune recommended to optimize. 3 hours.

mods.name: ECU Tune (CARB-Legal)
mods.description: A CARB-legal ECU tune optimizes timing and fueling for the Skyactiv engine. Gains of 10–15hp while maintaining emissions compliance.
mods.partNumbers: OVTune ND Skyactiv, CorkSport Power Series Calibration
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II port. Select map matching your mod level. Improves throttle response and removes rev hang. CARB-legal tunes safe for smog testing in California. Requires 91+ octane.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers make the already brilliant ND chassis even sharper. Essential for competitive autocross or track day use.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins Road & Track MI50, KW V3 35255001
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. The ND is light (2,300 lbs) so spring rates of 6k/4k work well for street/track. Set ride height 10–15mm below stock. Alignment critical.

mods.name: Supercharger Kit
mods.description: A supercharger kit adds 40–60% more power to the Skyactiv engine, addressing the ND's only real weakness — a lack of power.
mods.partNumbers: Edelbrock E-Force ND, Kraftwerks ND Supercharger Kit
mods.installNotes: Full kit includes supercharger, intercooler, fuel system upgrades, and ECU calibration. Low boost setup maintains factory reliability. Clutch upgrade needed on manual cars. 10+ hours.

mods.name: Lightweight Wheels
mods.description: The ND Miata is incredibly light and sensitive to unsprung weight. Lightweight forged wheels dramatically sharpen handling response.
mods.installNotes: Direct bolt-on. 16x7 is ideal for ND — saves weight over stock 17s. Pair with 205/50R16 tires for optimal grip. Hub-centric rings may be needed. Torque to 80 ft-lbs.
